# documentViewShouldHandlePrint

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether the document view should handle a print operation.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var documentViewShouldHandlePrint: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

If this method returns [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], the application terminates its print operation and sends [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebFrameView/printDocumentView()] to the web frame view.

## Printing Views

- **canPrintHeadersAndFooters**: A Boolean value indicating whether the receiver can print headers and footers.
- **printOperation(with:)**: Returns a print operation object to print this frame.
- **printDocumentView()**: Prints the receiver.
